title: News & Insights | Psychology Direct Blog
description: Expert insights, best practice guides, and updates on expert witness services, educational psychology, and professional development. Read our latest articles.

blocks.headline: Expert Insights on Psychology, Psychiatry & Education
blocks.subtitle: Articles on expert witness best practice, SEND guidance, professional development, and industry insights. Subscribe for monthly updates.

cards.title: 10 Tips for Choosing an Expert Witness in the UK
cards.description: Instructing an expert witness can feel like navigating unfamiliar territory. Learn best practices for selecting the right expert and avoiding common pitfalls.

cards.title: The Shift Towards Face-to-Face Educational Psychology Assessments
cards.description: Educational psychology services are shifting back to in-person assessment. Understand the trend, benefits, and implications for schools and practitioners.

cards.title: How Partnering with Psychology Direct Works for Associates
cards.description: Learn how independent psychologists and psychiatrists partner with us. Understand our network, support, and how we help build sustainable practices.

cards.title: How to Find a Qualified Expert Witness for a Legal Case
cards.description: Navigate the process of finding the right expert for your case. Best practices, questions to ask, and common mistakes to avoid.

cards.title: A School Leader's Guide to the EHCP Process
cards.description: As a school leader or SENCO, navigating EHCP can be overwhelming. This comprehensive guide walks through each step of the process.

cards.title: Keeping Children Safe in Education 2025
cards.description: The Department for Education has published KCSIE 2025. Understand the key changes and what they mean for schools and protection systems.

cards.title: Understanding PANS and PANDAS: A Guide for Educational Psychologists
cards.description: PANS and PANDAS are complex post-infectious conditions that profoundly affect learning and development. Understand identification and support.

cards.title: A Solicitor's Guide To Mental Health Expert Witnesses in Employment Tribunals
cards.description: Mental health claims are increasing in employment law. Learn when psychiatric and psychological expertise matters and how to instruct effectively.

cards.title: What the 2025 Safeguarding Report Revealed About Race and Child Protection
cards.description: Child safeguarding and race intersect critically. Understand the findings of the latest safeguarding report and implications for child protection.

faqs.question: How often do you send newsletters?
faqs.answer: We send a monthly digest with best articles, regulatory updates, and industry insights. You'll receive only one email per month.

faqs.question: Can I unsubscribe?
faqs.answer: Yes, anytime. Every email has an unsubscribe link. No hard feelings — you can resubscribe anytime.

faqs.question: Will you share my email address?
faqs.answer: No. We respect privacy and follow GDPR strictly. Your email is used only for the newsletter and Psychology Direct updates.

faqs.question: I'm interested in specific topics. Can I choose?
faqs.answer: Yes. During signup, select your interests (Expert Witness, Education, Professional Development). We'll tailor your monthly digest.

faqs.question: Can I read articles without subscribing?
faqs.answer: Yes, all articles are free online. Subscribing sends you a monthly summary so you never miss new content.

faqs.question: I'd like to contribute an article. Can I do that?
faqs.answer: We welcome guest contributions from qualified professionals. Email editorial@psychologydirect.co.uk with your article idea.

blocks.heading: Find Articles on a Specific Topic?
blocks.bodyText: Use the filter above to browse by topic. Or search our article library using the search bar at the top.

testimonials.quote: Their insights on fitness to plead changed how I approach these cases. Really valuable.
The EHCP guidance articles are better than most formal training. Bookmarked them.
Finally, practical guidance on setting rates and managing a private practice. Exactly what I needed.

blocks.heading: Stay Updated on Expert Insights
blocks.bodyText: Subscribe to our monthly newsletter for articles, updates, and professional development. Join 5,000+ subscribers.
